records.ety: [L. educere; e out + ducere to lead. See Duke.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Educed (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Educing (?).]

defs: To bring or draw out; to cause to appear; to produce against counter agency or influence; to extract; to evolve; as, to educe a form from matter.
quotes: The eternal art educing good from ill.
They want to educe and cultivate what is best and noblest in themselves.
